demo.title: lonestaroracle-x402.sh
demo.code:
# LoneStarOracle: pay-per-call data over x402 (USDC on Base). No signup, no API key.
# 1) Call any endpoint - you get HTTP 402 with payment terms
curl -s "https://defi.lonestaroracle.xyz/risk?protocol=morpho"

# 2) Pay the advertised USDC amount on Base with your x402-capable agent/wallet,
#    then retry the same URL with the payment proof header to receive JSON.

# More examples:
curl -s "https://funding.lonestaroracle.xyz/rates"             # perp funding rates
curl -s "https://equity.lonestaroracle.xyz/equity?symbol=NVDA" # equity signal + AI
curl -s "https://macro.lonestaroracle.xyz/macro"              # macro regime signal

# All 49 services: https://lonestaroracle.xyz  |  MCP: https://mcp.lonestaroracle.xyz/mcp

setup: No signup or API key. You need an x402-capable agent or wallet funded with USDC on Base.
On HTTP 402, pay the advertised USDC amount on Base and retry to receive structured JSON.
Browse all 49 services at https://lonestaroracle.xyz or connect via MCP at https://mcp.lonestaroracle.xyz/mcp
